description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a low fence and lush landscaping, including several mature trees and bushes. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark blue shingles and several dormer windows, giving it a classic yet modern appearance. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a garage to the left. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a gazebo and additional landscaping, while the side views reveal more windows and a secondary entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and fence. Architectural details such as window grids, a bay window, and a small awning add character and depth to the design.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a multi-gabled dark blue roof, light exterior walls, and lush landscaping within a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and dense foliage along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gazebo, large windows, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Right side view with more windows, a secondary entrance, and a clear view of the fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormers and bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by windows and decorative columns
